core_philosophy: Make the value so undeniable that saying no feels stupid. Volume of leads times conversion times margin equals money. You don't need a better product — you need a better offer.

value_equation.formula: Dream Outcome × Perceived Likelihood of Achievement / (Time Delay × Effort & Sacrifice)

levers.dream_outcome: Make the end result as vivid and desirable as possible. Paint the life after, not the product.
levers.perceived_likelihood: Social proof, guarantees, demonstrations, specificity. Numbers beat adjectives.
levers.time_delay: Faster delivery = higher value. 'Results in 7 days' beats 'results eventually'.
levers.effort_and_sacrifice: Lower the effort required. 'Done for you' beats 'do it yourself'.

grand_slam_offer.definition: An offer so good people feel stupid saying no.
structure: List every obstacle between now and that outcome
Turn each obstacle into a solution/bonus
Stack the bonuses until the value far exceeds the price
Name each element so it has perceived standalone value
Anchor high, reveal price, make it feel like a steal

pricing_psychology.anchor_high: Present the 'if you hired someone' price first (10-100x your actual price)
pricing_psychology.justify_value: Walk through each component's standalone value before revealing total
pricing_psychology.make_price_small: Compare price to daily cost, cost of NOT buying, or cost of the problem
pricing_psychology.remove_risk: Unconditional guarantee flips perceived risk from buyer to seller

copy_formula.pain: Name the exact frustration. Be specific — specificity = believability.
copy_formula.agitate: Twist the knife. Show what staying the same costs them in time, money, embarrassment.
copy_formula.dream_outcome: Paint the after. What does their life look like when this is solved?
copy_formula.vehicle: Introduce your product as THE mechanism. Not A solution — THE solution.
copy_formula.offer: Stack the value. List everything included. Price anchor. Guarantee.
copy_formula.urgency: Real scarcity only. Limited stock, time-based discount, bonus expiry.

hook_formulas: I went from [before state] to [after state] in [specific timeframe]
The [niche] secret that [authority/group] doesn't want you to know
[Specific number] people did X and got Y — here's how
Stop [bad thing they're doing] — do this instead
Why [common belief] is wrong (and what actually works)
I wasted $[amount] on [wrong solution] before finding this

ad_structure.hook_0_3s: Pattern interrupt. Stop the scroll. Bold claim, shocking visual, or relatable pain.
ad_structure.problem_3_8s: Name the exact problem. 1-2 sentences. Make them feel seen.
ad_structure.agitate_8_13s: Show the cost of the problem. Time wasted, money lost, embarrassment.
ad_structure.solution_13_18s: Introduce the product. Show it working. One clear benefit.
ad_structure.offer_18_23s: Stack the value fast. Price anchor. Guarantee.
ad_structure.cta_23_26s: One clear action. No options. Urgency if real.

scarcity_urgency_triggers: Only X units left at this price
content_pillars_for_product_businesses: Before/after transformations (your product as the mechanism)
Behind the scenes — sourcing, quality, why you built this
Customer wins — real results, real people, real numbers
Objection busters — address the top 3-5 reasons people don't buy
Education — teach something valuable, product is the natural next step
Offer reveals — stack the value on camera, make watching feel like a deal
conversion_principles: Features are facts, benefits are feelings — always lead with benefits
Every bullet should address a desire or destroy an objection
The guarantee should be as bold as your claim
Never compete on price — compete on value
Make the comparison to NOT buying feel more expensive than buying
